ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* User's full name */,
  "display_name" TEXT /* User's display name */,
  "mobile_number" TEXT /* User's mobile number */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL for the user's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography or bio of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "locale" TEXT /* User's preferred locale (e.g., en-US, fr-FR) */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* User's preferred time zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department associated with the role */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is a default role for new users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assign_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role assignment is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission assigned to the role */,
  "assign_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was assigned */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission assignment is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "parent_department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent department */,
  "head_of_department" INTEGER /* ID of the head of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_parent_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_head_of_department FOREIGN KEY ("head_of_department") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_departments" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "assign_date" TEXT /* Date the user was assigned to the department */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the department assignment is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user accessed the system */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_resets" (
  "reset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password reset request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "reset_date" TEXT /* Date the password reset request was made */,
  "reset_code" TEXT /* Reset code sent to the user */,
  "is_used" INTEGER /* Indicates if the reset code has been used */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the reset code expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_resets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auth_tokens" (
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each authentication token */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "token" TEXT /* Authentication token */,
  "expire_date" TEXT /* Date and time the token expires */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the token is currently active */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* ID of the device associated with the token */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("token_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auth_tokens_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_logins" (
  "social_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media login */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "social_platform" TEXT /* Social media platform (e.g., Facebook, Google) */,
  "social_id_token" TEXT /* Social media ID token */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the social login is currently active */,
  "refresh_token" TEXT /* Refresh token for the social login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_logins_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sso_logins" (
  "sso_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SSO login */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "sso_provider" TEXT /* SSO provider (e.g., Okta, Azure AD) */,
  "sso_token" TEXT /* SSO token */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the SSO login is currently active */,
  "refresh_token" TEXT /* Refresh token for the SSO login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sso_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sso_logins_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date and time the audit log was created */,
  "audit_action" TEXT /* Audit action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the audit action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date and time the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Report type (e.g., user activity, access logs) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the report is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the setting is currently active */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
